title: Portals +
description: Adds portals to Minecraft only in Creative via EntityJS
body:
🌀 EntityJS Portal Addon
This Java addon for EntityJS introduces portal-style entities to Minecraft, designed for modular integration into custom projects. Portals can currently be summoned only in Creative Mode, making them ideal for testing, world-building, or server-side scripting.

Whether you're building a dimension-hopping adventure or a fast-travel system, this addon provides a flexible foundation for portal mechanics.


🔮 Planned Features
Portals with relative coordinate targeting

Portals that connect different dimensions

Configurable portal behavior for advanced scripting

🚪 Current In-Game Content
Functional portals using a Waystone-style system (Teleportation within the same dimension using named anchors)
